response: The founders’ April investor update outlines key company milestones—including hitting 10,000 monthly active users, securing an $8 million Series A term sheet at a $40 million pre-money valuation, and hiring a VP of Sales—alongside core metrics: $85,000 monthly recurring revenue (12% month-over-month growth), a $120,000 monthly burn rate, and 11 months of projected runway post-funding. The update confirms the company’s Series A fundraising round is scheduled to close on May 10.
